Name: Effortless Rulesbooks
Description: A meta-ontology describing the ERB project itself: execution substrates, orchestration components, Airtable integration, testing framework, rulebook domains, data flows, configuration, and dependencies.

ProjectTranspilers.Name: airtabletorulebook
ProjectTranspilers.Description: Pull rulebook from Airtable (disabled — no Airtable base for this meta-ontology) [DISABLED: rulebook JSON is authoritative; re-enable only with explicit user consent]

ProjectTranspilers.Name: rulebooktoairtable
ProjectTranspilers.Description: Reverse-sync: push rulebook changes back to Airtable (optional)

ProjectTranspilers.Name: rulebooktopostgres
ProjectTranspilers.Description: Generate Postgres schema + seed data from the rulebook

ProjectTranspilers.Name: httplocalhost4242postgrescalculatedtorulebook
ProjectTranspilers.Description: Reverse spoke: refresh rulebook derived-field display copies from Postgres views after the destructive rebuild (raws verified, never written).
